Class FHlinkedList<E>

java.lang.Object
assistant.FHlinkedList<E>
Type Parameters:
E - The data type.
All Implemented Interfaces:
Cloneable, Iterable<E>, Collection<E>, Deque<E>, List<E>, Queue<E>, SequencedCollection<E>
public class FHlinkedList<E> extends Object implements Cloneable, Iterable<E>, Collection<E>, Queue<E>, Deque<E>, List<E>
Generic FHlinkedList class
